name: cicd-workflows
description: Generate Entur-standard CI/CD GitHub Actions workflows (ci, build, cd, pr, codeql) for Kotlin/Java, Go, or Python projects.

interface.shortDescription: Generate Entur-standard CI/CD GitHub Actions workflows.
interface.longDescription: Detects project language (Kotlin/Java, Go, Python) and generates required workflow files: ci.yaml, build.yaml, cd.yaml, pr.yaml, codeql.yaml using Entur reusable workflows.
